steps.title: Hardware Identification
steps.content: Verify spool holder and integrated cutter components.

es.title: Identificación de Herrajes
es.content: Verify spool holder and integrated cutter components.

steps.title: Mount to Rail/Wall
steps.content: Secure spool bracket onto trailer rail or wall framing using the provided hardware.

es.title: Mount to Rail/Wall
es.content: Secure spool bracket onto trailer rail or wall framing using the provided hardware.

steps.title: Load Spool
steps.content: Slide trimmer line spool onto post, secure with locking pin, and feed line end through integrated cutter hole.
